title: Glitch in Dates added through Zapier integration
excerpt: I have a Zapier integration which makes new items on a Monday board.  When a new item is created todays date is added into a date column, however when the new item is created it automatically switches on the “Add Time” s…

posts.author: Mal1 (Malcolm Axford)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a Zapier integration which makes new items on a Monday board. When a new item is created todays date is added into a date column, however when the new item is created it automatically switches on the “Add Time” switch so it then adds a time along with the date. The “Always keep “add time” option on”, setting in the column setup is not selected but it still keeps activating this switch to add the time. Can anyone help with this? thanks

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml: We may be able to help @Mal1 , sending you a PM
